hooks.name: Kimiflow active session
hooks.description: Keeps follow-up prompts inside the current Kimiflow run while an active session contract exists.

hooks.name: Kimiflow commit hygiene
hooks.description: Blocks broad git staging and secret-looking paths in Kimiflow repositories before Bash commands run.

hooks.name: Kimiflow run state
hooks.description: Checks Kimiflow run-state invariants before Bash commands can use gate resolver scripts.

hooks.name: Kimiflow test gate
hooks.description: Blocks completion when an opt-in Kimiflow test gate command is still failing.

hooks.name: Kimiflow active-session gate
hooks.description: Blocks completion while a Kimiflow active session still has unresolved items or stale state.

hooks.name: Kimiflow map staleness nudge
hooks.description: Surfaces a non-blocking nudge when the local project map has stale sections, rate-limited to once per day.

hooks.name: Kimiflow workqueue closeback nudge
hooks.description: Surfaces a non-blocking nudge when a Kimiflow run completed while the local workqueue still has open slices, rate-limited to once per day.
